title: Standard entity (ONT-E-08)
description: An industry / military / consensus standard (e.g. RTCA DO-178C, MIL-STD-1553B, SAE AS9100, ISO 9001, ARINC 429). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref. Pitfall #1 lock: unevaluatedProperties: false. Pitfall #9 lock: $schema = JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Locked to 'Standard' for this entity type.

version.description: Optional. Standard's own published version (e.g. 'C', 'Rev D', '2015'). Distinct from the entity record's `version` integer counter and `schema_version` semver, both inherited from entity.base.

effective_date.description: Optional ISO 8601 date when this standard version was published / takes effect.

status.description: Lifecycle status. 'superseded' standards may still be cited (legacy programs) but should be flagged; 'withdrawn' standards must not be the basis of new compliance arguments.

scope.description: Optional free-text scope description (≥20 chars when present). Captures what the standard covers (e.g. 'Software considerations in airborne systems and equipment certification').
